[09:35:53.198]             if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
[09:35:53.198]                 old_names <- names(...future.oldEnvVars)
[09:35:53.198]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:53.198]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:53.198]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:53.198]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:53.198]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:53.198]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:53.198]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:53.198]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:35:53.198]                 args <- list()
[09:35:53.198]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:53.198]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:53.198]                     next
[09:35:53.198]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:53.198]                 }
[09:35:53.198]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:53.198]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:53.198]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:53.198]                     next
[09:35:53.198]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:53.198]                 }
[09:35:53.198]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:53.198]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:53.198]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:53.198]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:53.198]                     next
[09:35:53.198]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:53.198]                 }
[09:35:53.198]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:53.198]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:53.198]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:53.198]             }
[09:35:53.198]             else {
[09:35:53.198]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:35:53.198]             }

+     stopifnot(identical(y1, unlist(x)))
+   } else {
+     stopifnot(identical(y1, y0))
+   }

[09:35:53.642]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:53.642]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:53.642]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:53.642]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:53.642]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:53.642]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:53.642]                     next

[09:35:53.642]                     next

[09:35:54.295]                 names <- names(envs)

[09:35:54.295]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:54.295]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:54.295]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:54.295]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:54.295]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:54.295]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]

[09:35:54.295]                     next

[09:35:54.295]                 }

[09:35:54.295]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:54.295]                     next
[09:35:54.295]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:54.295]                 }
[09:35:54.295]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:54.295]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:54.295]                   name <- removed[[kk]]

[09:35:54.295]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names))

[09:35:54.295]                 }

[09:35:54.295]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:54.295]             }

[09:35:54.409]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:54.409]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:54.409]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:54.409]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:54.409]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:54.409]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:54.409]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:54.409]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:35:54.409]                     next

[09:35:54.409]                 }

[09:35:54.409]                 }

[09:35:54.409]                 }

[09:35:54.409]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:54.409]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:54.409]             }
[09:35:54.409]             else {

[09:35:54.604]                 }
[09:35:54.604]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:54.604]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:54.604]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:54.604]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]

[09:35:54.604]                     next
[09:35:54.604]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:54.604]                 }
[09:35:54.604]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:54.604]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:54.604]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:54.604]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:54.604]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:54.604]                     next
[09:35:54.604]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:54.604]                 }
[09:35:54.604]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:54.604]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:54.604]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:54.604]             }
[09:35:54.604]             else {

[09:35:54.644]                   {
[09:35:54.644]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:54.644]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:54.644]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:54.644]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:54.644]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:54.644]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:54.644]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:54.644]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:54.644]                     }
[09:35:54.644]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:54.644]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:54.644]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:54.644]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:54.644]                     }
[09:35:54.644]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {

[09:35:54.644]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts

[09:35:54.845]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:35:54.845]                   {
[09:35:54.845]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:54.845]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:54.845]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:54.845]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:54.845]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:54.845]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:54.845]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:54.845]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")

[09:35:55.136]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:55.136]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:55.136]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:55.136]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:55.136]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:55.136]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:55.136]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:55.136]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:35:55.136]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:55.136]                     next
[09:35:55.136]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:55.136]                 }

[09:35:55.136]                     next

[09:35:55.136]                     next

[09:35:55.316]                   {

[09:35:55.316]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {

[09:35:55.316]                       stopf("Cannot save RDS file because a temporary save file already exists: %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)",

[09:35:55.316]                       ex$message <- msg
[09:35:55.316]                       stop(ex)
[09:35:55.316]                     })
[09:35:55.316]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))

[09:35:55.644]                   save_rds <- function (object, pathname, ...) 
[09:35:55.644]                   {
[09:35:55.644]                     pathname_tmp <- sprintf("%s.tmp", pathname)
[09:35:55.644]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {
[09:35:55.644]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:35:55.644]                       stopf("Cannot save RDS file because a temporary save file already exists: %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)", 
[09:35:55.644]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:35:55.644]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]])
[09:35:55.644]                     }
[09:35:55.644]                     tryCatch({
[09:35:55.644]                       saveRDS(object, file = pathname_tmp, ...)
[09:35:55.644]                     }, error = function(ex) {
[09:35:55.644]                       msg <- conditionMessage(ex)
[09:35:55.644]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:35:55.644]                       msg <- sprintf("saveRDS() failed to save to temporary file %s (%.0f bytes; last modified on %s). The reason was: %s", 
[09:35:55.644]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:35:55.644]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]], msg)
[09:35:55.644]                       ex$message <- msg
[09:35:55.644]                       stop(ex)
[09:35:55.644]                     })
[09:35:55.644]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))
[09:35:55.644]                     res <- file.rename(from = pathname_tmp, to = pathname)
[09:35:55.644]                     if (!res || file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {
[09:35:55.644]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:35:55.644]                       fi <- file.info(pathname)
[09:35:55.644]                       msg <- sprintf("save_rds() failed to rename temporary save file %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s) to %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)", 
[09:35:55.644]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:35:55.644]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]], sQuote(pathname), 
[09:35:55.644]                         fi[["size"]], fi[["mtime"]])
[09:35:55.644]                       stop(msg)
[09:35:55.644]                     }
[09:35:55.644]                     invisible(pathname)
[09:35:55.644]                   }
[09:35:55.644]                   saveImmediateCondition <- function (cond, path = immediateConditionsPath(rootPath = rootPath), 
[09:35:55.644]                     rootPath = tempdir()) 
[09:35:55.644]                   {
[09:35:55.644]                     obj <- list(time = Sys.time(), condition = cond)
[09:35:55.644]                     file <- tempfile(pattern = class(cond)[1], 
[09:35:55.644]                       tmpdir = path, fileext = ".rds")
[09:35:55.644]                     save_rds(obj, file)
[09:35:55.644]                   }
[09:35:55.644]                   saveImmediateCondition(cond, path = "/tmp/RtmpNybsEX/.future/immediateConditions")
[09:35:55.644]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:35:55.644]                   {
[09:35:55.644]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:55.644]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:55.644]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:55.644]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:55.644]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:55.644]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:55.644]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:55.644]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:55.644]                     }
[09:35:55.644]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:55.644]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:55.644]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:55.644]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:55.644]                     }
[09:35:55.644]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:55.644]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:55.644]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:55.644]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:55.644]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:55.644]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:55.644]                           name <- restart$name
[09:35:55.644]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:55.644]                             next
[09:35:55.644]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:55.644]                             next
[09:35:55.644]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:55.644]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:55.644]                           break
[09:35:55.644]                         }
[09:35:55.644]                       }
[09:35:55.644]                     }
[09:35:55.644]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:35:55.644]                   }

[09:35:55.943]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:55.943]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:55.943]                       if (muffled)

[09:35:55.943]                         grepl <- base::grepl

[09:35:55.943]                             next

[09:35:55.943]                             next
[09:35:55.943]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:55.943]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:55.943]                           break
[09:35:55.943]                         }

[09:35:56.133]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:35:56.133]                   {
[09:35:56.133]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:56.133]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:56.133]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:56.133]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:56.133]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:56.133]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:56.133]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:56.133]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:56.133]                     }
[09:35:56.133]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:56.133]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:56.133]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:56.133]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:56.133]                     }
[09:35:56.133]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:56.133]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:56.133]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:56.133]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:56.133]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:56.133]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:56.133]                           name <- restart$name
[09:35:56.133]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:56.133]                             next

[09:35:56.376]                 names <- names(envs)

[09:35:56.376]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:56.376]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:56.376]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:56.376]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:56.376]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:35:56.376]                     next
[09:35:56.376]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:56.376]                 }

[09:35:56.376]                     next

[09:35:56.376]                 }

[09:35:56.376]                 }

[09:35:56.376]             }

[09:35:56.499]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:56.499]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:56.499]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:56.499]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:56.499]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:35:56.499]                 args <- list()
[09:35:56.499]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:56.499]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:56.499]                     next
[09:35:56.499]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:56.499]                 }
[09:35:56.499]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:56.499]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:56.499]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:56.499]                     next
[09:35:56.499]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:56.499]                 }
[09:35:56.499]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:56.499]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:56.499]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:56.499]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:56.499]                     next
[09:35:56.499]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:56.499]                 }
[09:35:56.499]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:56.499]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:56.499]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:56.499]             }
[09:35:56.499]             else {
[09:35:56.499]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:35:56.499]             }
[09:35:56.499]             {
[09:35:56.499]                 if (base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded) > 
[09:35:56.499]                   0L) {

[09:35:56.628]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart

[09:35:56.628]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:56.628]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:56.628]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:56.628]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:56.628]                     }
[09:35:56.628]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:56.628]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:56.628]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:56.628]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:56.628]                     }
[09:35:56.628]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:56.628]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:56.628]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:56.628]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:56.628]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:56.628]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:56.628]                           name <- restart$name
[09:35:56.628]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:56.628]                             next
[09:35:56.628]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:56.628]                             next
[09:35:56.628]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:56.628]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:56.628]                           break
[09:35:56.628]                         }
[09:35:56.628]                       }
[09:35:56.628]                     }
[09:35:56.628]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:35:56.628]                   }
[09:35:56.628]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:35:56.628]                 })

[09:35:57.639]                 }

[09:35:57.639]                 }

[09:35:57.639]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:57.639]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:57.639]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:57.639]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:57.639]                     next
[09:35:57.639]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:57.639]                 }
[09:35:57.639]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:57.639]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:57.639]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:57.639]             }
[09:35:57.639]             else {

[09:35:57.639]             }

[09:35:57.639]                   0L) {

[09:35:57.966]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:57.966]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:57.966]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:57.966]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:57.966]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:57.966]                     }
[09:35:57.966]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:57.966]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:57.966]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:57.966]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:57.966]                     }
[09:35:57.966]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:57.966]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:57.966]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:57.966]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:57.966]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:57.966]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:57.966]                           name <- restart$name
[09:35:57.966]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:57.966]                             next
[09:35:57.966]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:57.966]                             next
[09:35:57.966]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:57.966]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:57.966]                           break
[09:35:57.966]                         }

[09:35:58.491]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:58.491]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:58.491]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:58.491]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:58.491]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:58.491]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:58.491]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:58.491]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:35:58.491]                 args <- list()
[09:35:58.491]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:58.491]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:58.491]                     next
[09:35:58.491]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:58.491]                 }
[09:35:58.491]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:58.491]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:58.491]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:58.491]                     next
[09:35:58.491]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:58.491]                 }
[09:35:58.491]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:58.491]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:58.491]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:58.491]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:58.491]                     next
[09:35:58.491]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:58.491]                 }
[09:35:58.491]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:58.491]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:58.491]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:58.491]             }
[09:35:58.491]             else {

[09:36:00.291]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:00.291]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:00.291]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:00.291]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:00.291]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:00.291]                     }
[09:36:00.291]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:00.291]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")

[09:36:00.291]                         for (restart in restarts) {

[09:36:00.291]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:00.291]                             next
[09:36:00.291]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:00.291]                             next
[09:36:00.291]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:00.291]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:00.291]                           break
